posts.author: rmarder (Ricki)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, Monday automations only support “AND” conditions, which limits flexibility. Adding an “OR” option would allow automations to trigger when either of multiple conditions are true, reducing the need to duplicate workflows.

What are you trying to achieve

I want to simplify automation building, avoid redundant rules, and create more efficient workflows that respond to different conditions in a single automation.
